creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213086
ubreak, update documentation

- unbreak and un-expire cad/fidocadj by switching it to GitHub. Note that using USE_GITHUB is impossible, because that assumes a hardcoded .tar.gz extension and
this port downloads a .jar file instead.
- update the accompanying PDF to version 0.24.6 too.
- use DIST_SUBDIR

Version 0.24.7 is out, but only for the .jar file, not for the PDF. That is for another PR.
